title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Zoro, Unknown person #6, Vegapunk as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...one so advanced that it is hard to believe it existed over 900 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The weapons that existed during this century-long struggle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: are far beyond our modern science.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FEFE FEFE! FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FE FEET!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's that peanut headed fool saying?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aww:) Boss, you're making me hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such technology is baffling even to a genius such as myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's so big headed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU PU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and therein lies our problem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: LABO- stream

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hi Rjru

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GACHA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: stussy... Weez... Weez...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Edison?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lower the barrier and hightail it out of there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... I can't! What if something were to happen to the straw hat crew?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah'm gonna be straight with ya... there ain't no point in the barrier no more...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not when there are monsters on the island who can ignore it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've done all we can for 'em...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...ah'w sure they'll make it somehow!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How much longer, jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My apologies! We're almost there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We WERE BUSY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that you, zero?! You're gonna get it later!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now hurry up! They're moving their ships to blockade the Northeast coast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive you if we get blasted out of the water after all this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's good to hear. I was worried Vegapunk would...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...never forgive me if I let them get caught.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if! Now get your ass outta there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "But... I don't know what to do with myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that Vegapunk's gone... Who am I meant to live for?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have no purpose...

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
